title: Wails v3 Template
description: Metadata for a Wails v3 template (template.yaml)

shortname.description: Short identifier used in the CLI (e.g. 'react', 'vanilla-ts')

description.description: Short description of the template shown in the CLI

helpurl.description: URL to documentation or a help page for this template

version.description: Version of the template (semver, e.g. v1.0.0)

wailsVersion.description: Wails major version this template targets. Must be 3.
